---
title: "Narisse Trippel"
name: "Narisse Trippel"
image: "/images/profile_pics/nar_trippel.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Meta-analysis of anthropogenic factors impacting hormonal stress in birds."
location: "**Research location:** Wyoming"
dates: "**Dates:** 2023"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "4"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
